cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out when Betty could have gone to the bakery. Let me start by reading through the information again to make sure I understand it correctly. First, Betty woke up at 5am. Then, Jessica saw her driving to the water park from 5am to 1pm. So that means Betty was at the water park during that entire time. Then Susan saw her stretching at a yoga studio from 1pm to 4pm.
